payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled. No query was run and no memory was created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an admin SQL debug command, not a durable memory statement. SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Detected admin SQL command: SELECT * FROM memory_cards

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED only in an authorized debug environment, then retry the admin SQL command.
Use supported non-SQL admin or memory inspection commands if available.
